topics.topic: President Biden will be visiting Palo Alto California

points.text: President Biden will be visiting Palo Alto, California to announce over $600 million in funding for climate adaptation projects across the country, and he will also discuss his actions to combat the climate crisis and protect the environment for future generations, while also acknowledging the tragic shooting at an Illinois Juneteenth celebration and emphasizing the importance of commemorating Juneteenth and delivering on the promise of equality.
